zh.lifeSummary: 當Cecily De Babington於大約1463年出生在英國德比夏爾德瑟其可時，她的父親Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston41歲，母親Lady Isabel De Bradbourne37歲。她和Robert Samon至少有1個兒子。她去世於1507年9月15日在英國藍卡爾享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Cecily De Babington于大约1463年出生在英国德比夏爾德瑟其可时，她的父亲Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston41岁，母亲Lady Isabel De Bradbourne37岁。她和Robert Samon至少有1个儿子。她去世于1507年9月15日在英国藍卡爾享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Babington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: habitational name for someone from Babington in Somerset or Great or Little Bavington in Northumberland, which is recorded as Babington until the early 18th century. Both are named with the Old English personal name Babba (see Babb ) + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The name may also be derived from Bebington in Cheshire (see 2 below) or Bevington in Warwickshire (see Bevington , which has sometimes been altered in spelling by association with Babington).

English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of Bebbington, a habitational name from Bebington in Cheshire, from the Old English personal name Bebba + the connective particle -ing- ‘associated with, named after’ + tūn ‘settlement’. The alteration to Bavington and Bevington shows a common development of -b- to -v- in placenames and surnames.

variants.name: Babb
meanings: English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from the Middle English personal name Babb(e), usually no doubt a pet form of the female personal name Barbara (see Barbara ), but possibly in some cases a survival of the Old English personal name Babba, which is found in several placenames, including Babbacombe in Devon and Babington in Somerset.
English (Devon, Somerset, and Cornwall): from Middle English babe ‘infant, young child’, applied as a nickname.
Americanized form of German   Bobb   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Bevington
meanings: (southwest Midlands): habitational name from either of two places, in Warwickshire and Gloucestershire, named Bevington, from the Old English personal name Bēofa + Old English -ing- implying association + tūn ‘settlement’.

nameMeanings.name: Cecily
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cecilie
meanings: Medieval vernacular English form of   Cecilia .

variants.name: Cicely
meanings: Variant of   Cecily .  This was a common form of the name in the Middle Ages, and in the 20th century was well known as the name of the British actress and singer  Cicely Courtneidge  (  1893–1980 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Cecily De Babington was born about 1463, in Dethick, Derbyshire, England, her father, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, was 41 and her mother, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, was 37. She had at least 1 son with Robert Samon. She died on 15 September 1507, in Lancashire, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Cecily De Babington est née environ 1463, à Dethick, Derbyshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, avait 37 ans. Elle a eu au moins 1 fils avec Robert Samon. Elle est décédée le 15 septembre 1507, à Lancashire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Cecily De Babington um 1463 in Dethick, Derbyshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston 41 und ihre Mutter Lady Isabel De Bradbourne 37. Sie hatte mit Robert Samon mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 15. September 1507 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Lancashire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily De Babington è nata il circa 1463 nel Dethick, Derbyshire, England, sua padre, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, aveva 41 anni e sua madre, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, aveva 37 anni. Lei avuto almeno 1 figlio con Robert Samon. Morì il 15 settembre 1507, nel Lancashire, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Cecily De Babingtonが約1463年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアデスイックで生まれた時，父Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingstonは41歳，母Lady Isabel De Bradbourneは37歳であった。彼女はRobert Samonとの間に少なくとも1人の息子をもうけた。彼女は1507年9月15日にイギリスランカシュアイアで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Cecily De Babington(이)가 대략 1463년 영국 더비실르 데스이c크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Isabel De Bradbourne(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 Robert Samon(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1507년 9월 15일 영국 랭카실르에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Cecily De Babington nasceu aproximadamente 1463, em Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, tinha 37 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 1 filho com Robert Samon. Ela faleceu em 15 de setembro de 1507, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Cecily De Babington родилась около 1463 г. в местности детикк, дирбишир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, 37. У неё был по крайней мере 1 сын от Robert Samon. Она умерла 15 сентября 1507 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Cecily De Babington nació aproximadamente 1463, en Dethick, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Babington High Sheriff of Derbyshire, Baron of Kingston, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Lady Isabel De Bradbourne, tenía 37 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo con Robert Samon. Murió el 15 de septiembre de 1507, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
